productDisplayName: Fossil Men Evans Zip Trifold Black Wallet
description: Crafted from soft genuine leather, this black wallet from fossil is a fabulously stylish way to keep your money and cards safe and secure. With a smooth finish, this three-fold wallet has an embossed branding on the upper and lots of inner storage making it perfect for everyday use. Dimensions: 10.5 cm x 23 cm Genuine soft leather for flexibility and suppleness Two main compartments with fabric inner lining One zippered compartment for enhanced space Multiple partitions on the three-fold to stash away id cards, credit cards and coins Comes with authentic Fossil collectible tin. Care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
